title: REST API Example
description: Building a complete example with JSONPlaceholder.

slides.title: Complete Project: Posts Viewer 📱
slides.content:
# Let's Build a Posts App

We'll fetch posts from JSONPlaceholder, display them in a list, and add a detail screen.

Steps:
1. Create model (Post).
2. Create API service class.
3. Display list with FutureBuilder.
4. Navigate to detail on tap.

quizData.question: What is JSONPlaceholder?

options.text: A fake online REST API for testing

quizData.explanation: JSONPlaceholder is a free fake API for prototyping.

slides.title: API Service and UI
Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Separate concerns

Keep your API calls in a separate service class for better organization and testability.
